title: Letter D and the word 'sad'
description: Letter D — left middle finger. Make the word 'sad'!
text: d d d d ad ad ad da da da sad sad sad dad dad dad add add add

character_tips.maxim: Three letters, four words. Fast progress.
character_tips.knopych: WORDS! 🎉 sad, dad, add — you're a writer!
character_tips.klavochka: Three little letters making words, my treasure 🌟 So clever!
